csv:
TestCase ID,Description,Execution steps
TC-C2001,Verify user authentication with approved credentials,1. Open the sign-in page. ; 2. Enter a valid approved username and password. ; 3. Select Sign In. ; 4. Verify access to the authorized landing page.
TC-C2002,Verify role-based access control for protected functions,1. Sign in as a user without administrator privileges. ; 2. Attempt to open an administrator-only function. ; 3. Verify access is denied. ; 4. Sign in as an administrator. ; 5. Verify the function is accessible.
TC-C2003,Verify audit logging of sign-in attempts,"1. Attempt one successful sign-in and one failed sign-in. ; 2. Open the audit log as an authorized user. ; 3. Locate both events. ; 4. Verify each entry includes user, timestamp, and outcome."
TC-C2004,Verify account lockout after repeated failed sign-ins,1. Use a valid user account. ; 2. Enter an incorrect password five times. ; 3. Attempt a sixth sign-in. ; 4. Verify the account is locked and a clear message is displayed.
TC-C2005,Verify administrator password reset,1. Sign in as an administrator. ; 2. Select a test user account. ; 3. Initiate a password reset. ; 4. Verify the reset is recorded. ; 5. Verify the user can sign in using the temporary password.
TC-C2006,Verify password complexity enforcement,1. Start a password change. ; 2. Enter a password that violates the configured policy. ; 3. Submit the change. ; 4. Verify the password is rejected with a validation message.
TC-C2007,Verify temporary password expiration after first use,1. Reset a test user's password. ; 2. Sign in with the temporary password. ; 3. Complete the required password change. ; 4. Attempt to sign in again with the temporary password. ; 5. Verify it is rejected.
TC-C2008,Verify encryption of sensitive stored data,1. Create a record containing approved test-sensitive data. ; 2. Inspect the stored database value using authorized access. ; 3. Verify the value is not stored in readable plaintext.
TC-C2009,Verify encryption of sensitive data in transit,1. Start a browser session to the application. ; 2. Inspect the connection security details. ; 3. Submit a record containing test-sensitive data. ; 4. Verify transmission uses an approved encrypted protocol.
TC-C2010,Verify required-field validation on user records,1. Open the new user form. ; 2. Leave a required field blank. ; 3. Submit the form. ; 4. Verify the record is not saved and the required field is identified.
TC-C2011,Verify clear validation messages for invalid input,1. Enter an invalid value in a validated field. ; 2. Submit the form. ; 3. Verify an understandable validation message identifies the issue.
TC-C2012,Verify duplicate email prevention,1. Create a user with a unique email address. ; 2. Attempt to create another user with the same email address. ; 3. Verify the second record is rejected.
TC-C2013,Verify record creation audit metadata,1. Sign in as a test user. ; 2. Create a managed record. ; 3. View its audit metadata. ; 4. Verify creation time and creator are recorded.
TC-C2014,Verify record modification audit metadata,1. Modify an existing managed record. ; 2. View its audit metadata. ; 3. Verify last modification time and modifier are updated.
TC-C2015,Verify audit-record retention configuration,1. Open the retention configuration as an administrator. ; 2. Review the audit-record retention setting. ; 3. Verify it is configured for at least seven years.
TC-C2016,Verify authorized record search by identifier,1. Sign in as an authorized user. ; 2. Search for a known record identifier. ; 3. Verify the matching record is returned.
TC-C2017,Verify filtering by status and date range,1. Open a record list. ; 2. Apply a status filter and a date-range filter. ; 3. Run the search. ; 4. Verify all returned records match both filters.
TC-C2018,Verify pageable search results,1. Search for a set of records that exceeds one page. ; 2. Navigate to the next page. ; 3. Verify additional results appear and page navigation is available.
TC-C2019,Verify export of authorized search results to CSV,1. Run a record search as an authorized user. ; 2. Select Export. ; 3. Open the exported file. ; 4. Verify it is CSV format and contains the displayed authorized results.
TC-C2020,Verify printable individual-record report,1. Open an individual record. ; 2. Select Print or Generate Report. ; 3. Verify a printable report is generated with the record details.
TC-C2021,Verify unique system-generated record identifiers,1. Create two new records. ; 2. Record their generated identifiers. ; 3. Verify both identifiers are present and distinct.
TC-C2022,Verify deletion prevention for referenced records,1. Identify a record referenced by an active transaction. ; 2. Attempt to delete it. ; 3. Verify deletion is prevented with an explanatory message.
TC-C2023,Verify authorized archival of inactive records,1. Sign in as an authorized user. ; 2. Select an inactive record. ; 3. Archive the record. ; 4. Verify the record status changes to archived.
TC-C2024,Verify administrator-only restoration of archived records,1. Sign in as a non-administrator and attempt to restore an archived record. ; 2. Verify access is denied. ; 3. Sign in as an administrator and restore it. ; 4. Verify restoration succeeds.
TC-C2025,Verify configured status display,1. Open records in each available status. ; 2. Verify each displayed status matches a configured status value.
TC-C2026,Verify notification on record creation,1. Assign a user while creating a record. ; 2. Save the record. ; 3. Verify the assigned user receives a creation notification.
TC-C2027,Verify notification on record reassignment,1. Open an assigned record. ; 2. Reassign it to another user. ; 3. Save changes. ; 4. Verify the new assignee receives a notification.
TC-C2028,Verify due-date notification,1. Create a record with a due date within the notification threshold. ; 2. Run the notification process or wait for the scheduled job. ; 3. Verify the owner receives a due-date notification.
TC-C2029,Verify notification acknowledgement,1. Open an unread notification. ; 2. Select Acknowledge. ; 3. Verify its status changes to acknowledged.
TC-C2030,Verify notification delivery history,"1. Trigger a notification. ; 2. Open notification history. ; 3. Verify recipient, timestamp, delivery outcome, and notification type are present."
TC-C2031,Verify synchronization with approved time source,1. Open system time configuration or monitoring data. ; 2. Verify synchronization with the approved source is active. ; 3. Compare system time to the approved source within the allowed tolerance.
TC-C2032,Verify UTC timestamp recording,1. Create an auditable event. ; 2. Inspect its stored timestamp through authorized access. ; 3. Verify the stored value is in Coordinated Universal Time.
TC-C2033,Verify local time-zone timestamp display,1. Set a user's preferred time zone. ; 2. Open a record with a known UTC timestamp. ; 3. Verify the displayed time is converted to the selected local time zone.
TC-C2034,Verify support for 200 active users,1. Use an approved load-test tool. ; 2. Simulate 200 active authenticated users. ; 3. Execute representative workflows. ; 4. Verify all sessions remain functional.
TC-C2035,Verify record retrieval performance,"1. Under normal load, retrieve a representative record repeatedly. ; 2. Capture response times. ; 3. Verify standard retrieval operations complete within two seconds."
TC-C2036,Verify record save performance,"1. Under normal load, save representative records repeatedly. ; 2. Capture response times. ; 3. Verify standard save operations complete within three seconds."
TC-C2037,Verify planned-restart recovery time,1. Record the application availability time. ; 2. Perform an approved planned restart. ; 3. Measure the time until service is available. ; 4. Verify recovery is within fifteen minutes.
TC-C2038,Verify daily scheduled backups,1. Review scheduled backup configuration and history. ; 2. Verify at least one successful backup exists for each 24-hour period.
TC-C2039,Verify backup integrity validation,1. Run or review a scheduled backup. ; 2. Review backup verification results. ; 3. Verify integrity validation completed successfully.
TC-C2040,Verify restoration to recovery environment,1. Select an approved backup. ; 2. Restore it to the designated recovery environment. ; 3. Verify the restored data is accessible and complete.
TC-C2041,Verify service-interruption availability alert,1. Stop or simulate loss of the application service in a test environment. ; 2. Observe monitoring alerts. ; 3. Verify an interruption alert is generated.
TC-C2042,Verify low-storage capacity alert,1. Configure or simulate remaining storage below 20 percent. ; 2. Run storage monitoring. ; 3. Verify a low-capacity alert is generated.
TC-C2043,Verify restriction of administrative functions,1. Sign in as a standard user. ; 2. Attempt each representative administrative function. ; 3. Verify all are inaccessible.
TC-C2044,Verify inactive-session termination,1. Sign in as a test user. ; 2. Leave the session inactive for 30 minutes. ; 3. Perform an action. ; 4. Verify reauthentication is required.
TC-C2045,Verify session identifier invalidation after sign-out,1. Sign in and capture the session identifier through approved test tooling. ; 2. Sign out. ; 3. Attempt to reuse the identifier. ; 4. Verify access is denied.
TC-C2046,Verify administrator multi-factor authentication,1. Start an administrator sign-in. ; 2. Enter valid credentials. ; 3. Complete the configured second factor. ; 4. Verify access is granted only after successful multi-factor verification.
TC-C2047,Verify audit logging of security configuration changes,"1. Change a security-relevant configuration as an administrator. ; 2. Open the audit log. ; 3. Verify the change, actor, timestamp, and old/new values are recorded."
TC-C2048,Verify password-expiration configuration,1. Open password policy settings as an administrator. ; 2. Configure a test expiration period. ; 3. Save settings. ; 4. Verify the setting persists and is applied to a test account.
TC-C2049,Verify notification delivery preference configuration,1. Open notification preferences as an administrator. ; 2. Change a delivery preference. ; 3. Save and trigger a notification. ; 4. Verify delivery follows the selected preference.
TC-C2050,Verify imported data schema validation,1. Prepare an import file with an invalid field format. ; 2. Upload the file. ; 3. Verify validation identifies the invalid data and prevents invalid import.
TC-C2051,Verify rejection of unrecognized import columns,1. Prepare an import file with an extra unsupported column. ; 2. Upload the file. ; 3. Verify the file is rejected and the unknown column is identified.
TC-C2052,Verify import error report for rejected rows,1. Upload an import file containing invalid rows. ; 2. Open the import result. ; 3. Verify an error report identifies each rejected row and reason.
TC-C2053,Verify valid-row processing despite unrelated import errors,1. Upload an import file containing both valid and invalid rows. ; 2. Complete the import. ; 3. Verify valid rows are processed and invalid rows are reported separately.
TC-C2054,Verify import transaction summary,"1. Upload an import file. ; 2. Open the import transaction result. ; 3. Verify it includes upload time, totals, successes, failures, and submitter."
TC-C2055,Verify approved import-template download,1. Sign in as an authorized user. ; 2. Select Download Import Template. ; 3. Verify the downloaded template contains approved headers and guidance.
TC-C2056,Verify authorized API access,1. Send an authorized request to a published API endpoint. ; 2. Verify a successful response is returned with expected data.
TC-C2057,Verify API token authentication,1. Send a request with a valid approved API token. ; 2. Verify it succeeds. ; 3. Send the same request with an invalid token. ; 4. Verify it is rejected.
TC-C2058,Verify standardized API error response,1. Send an invalid API request. ; 2. Inspect the response. ; 3. Verify it uses the documented error structure and status code.
TC-C2059,Verify API rate limiting,1. Send requests exceeding the configured rate limit. ; 2. Verify excess requests receive the documented throttling response.
TC-C2060,Verify published API version compatibility,1. Call a supported published API version using a compatible request. ; 2. Verify the response remains compatible with the published contract.
TC-C2061,Verify outbound-message validation,1. Configure an outbound message with invalid required content. ; 2. Trigger transmission. ; 3. Verify transmission is blocked and a validation event is recorded.
TC-C2062,Verify retry of failed outbound integration,1. Simulate a temporary external-system failure. ; 2. Trigger an outbound integration. ; 3. Restore the external service. ; 4. Verify retries occur according to policy and eventually succeed.
TC-C2063,Verify diagnostic integration failure logging,"1. Simulate an integration failure. ; 2. Review integration logs. ; 3. Verify diagnostic details such as endpoint, time, correlation ID, and error are recorded."
TC-C2064,Verify authorized integration-status view,1. Sign in as an authorized user. ; 2. Open integration status. ; 3. Verify current or recent integration states are displayed.
TC-C2065,Verify unauthorized configuration-change prevention,1. Sign in as a non-authorized user. ; 2. Attempt to edit a system configuration value. ; 3. Verify the edit is blocked.
TC-C2066,Verify configuration-change history,"1. Change a configuration value as an administrator. ; 2. Open configuration history. ; 3. Verify the actor, timestamp, old value, and new value are recorded."
TC-C2067,Verify approval requirement for production configuration changes,1. Submit a production configuration change. ; 2. Attempt to apply it without approval. ; 3. Verify application is blocked. ; 4. Obtain approval and verify application succeeds.
TC-C2068,Verify application-version display for administrators,1. Sign in as an administrator. ; 2. Open system information. ; 3. Verify the current application version is displayed.
TC-C2069,Verify online help for primary workflows,1. Open each primary workflow. ; 2. Select the available help option. ; 3. Verify context-appropriate guidance is available.
TC-C2070,Verify accessible labels for interactive controls,1. Open representative application pages using an accessibility inspection tool. ; 2. Inspect interactive controls. ; 3. Verify each control has an accessible label.
TC-C2071,Verify keyboard-only navigation,1. Open primary workflows. ; 2. Navigate using only keyboard controls. ; 3. Verify all required actions are reachable and usable.
TC-C2072,Verify text and control contrast,1. Inspect representative pages using an approved contrast tool. ; 2. Verify text and interactive control contrast meets the applicable requirement.
TC-C2073,"Verify secure, meaningful error messages",1. Trigger a representative system error. ; 2. Review the user-facing message. ; 3. Verify it explains the issue without exposing sensitive technical details.
TC-C2074,Verify confirmation of destructive actions,1. Start a destructive action such as deletion. ; 2. Verify a confirmation prompt appears. ; 3. Cancel the prompt and verify no change occurs. ; 4. Confirm the action and verify it proceeds.
TC-C2075,Verify cancellation of record edits,1. Open an existing record and modify a field. ; 2. Select Cancel. ; 3. Reopen the record. ; 4. Verify the change was not saved.
TC-C2076,Verify preservation of user-entered data on validation failure,"1. Enter values in a form, including one invalid value. ; 2. Submit the form. ; 3. Verify validation occurs. ; 4. Verify valid entered values remain available for correction."
TC-C2077,Verify supported list-view sorting,1. Open a supported list view. ; 2. Sort by each supported column. ; 3. Verify the displayed ordering changes correctly.
TC-C2078,Verify configurable visible list columns,1. Open a supported list view. ; 2. Change visible-column settings. ; 3. Save preferences. ; 4. Verify the selected columns are displayed.
TC-C2079,Verify persistence of display preferences,1. Set list-view preferences. ; 2. Sign out and sign back in. ; 3. Verify the preferences are retained.
TC-C2080,Verify unique external transaction correlation IDs,1. Initiate two external transactions. ; 2. Inspect transaction records. ; 3. Verify each has a populated and unique correlation identifier.
TC-C2081,Verify correlation IDs in application logs,1. Initiate an externally initiated transaction. ; 2. Search relevant application logs. ; 3. Verify the transaction correlation ID is present.
TC-C2082,Verify protection of log files from unauthorized modification,1. Attempt to modify a log file using a non-authorized account. ; 2. Verify modification is denied.
TC-C2083,Verify log rotation according to retention policy,1. Generate sufficient logs or advance a test environment to trigger rotation. ; 2. Inspect log storage. ; 3. Verify rotation and retention follow configured policy.
TC-C2084,Verify monitoring health-check endpoint,1. Call the health-check endpoint. ; 2. Verify it returns the expected success response when the application is healthy.
TC-C2085,Verify dependency health reporting,1. Make a dependent service unavailable in a test environment. ; 2. Call the health-check endpoint. ; 3. Verify dependency health is reported as degraded or unavailable.
TC-C2086,Verify blocking of unsupported browsers,1. Access a protected workflow using an unsupported browser version. ; 2. Verify access is blocked.
TC-C2087,Verify supported-browser guidance message,1. Access the application using an unsupported browser version. ; 2. Verify a message explains supported-browser requirements.
TC-C2088,Verify compatibility with approved operating systems,1. Access representative workflows from each approved operating system. ; 2. Verify core workflows operate successfully.
TC-C2089,Verify upload type and size validation,1. Attempt to upload a disallowed file type. ; 2. Verify rejection. ; 3. Attempt to upload an oversized allowed type. ; 4. Verify rejection with a clear message.
TC-C2090,Verify malicious-file scanning,1. Upload an approved harmless test file that triggers the malware-scanning test response. ; 2. Verify the file is not made available. ; 3. Verify the event is recorded.
TC-C2091,Verify system-generated stored filenames,1. Upload a file with a known client filename. ; 2. Inspect stored file metadata through authorized access. ; 3. Verify the stored name is system-generated.
TC-C2092,Verify authorization for uploaded-file download,1. Attempt to download a protected uploaded file as an unauthorized user. ; 2. Verify access is denied. ; 3. Repeat as an authorized user and verify download succeeds.
TC-C2093,Verify managed-document version history,1. Create a managed document. ; 2. Upload or save a revised version. ; 3. Open version history. ; 4. Verify both versions are listed.
TC-C2094,Verify comparison of managed-document versions,1. Open a document with two versions. ; 2. Select Compare Versions. ; 3. Verify differences between selected versions are presented.
TC-C2095,Verify audit event for document downloads,1. Download a managed document as an authorized user. ; 2. Open the audit log. ; 3. Verify a document-download event is recorded.
TC-C2096,Verify configurable record-category retention periods,1. Open retention settings as an administrator. ; 2. Configure a retention period for a record category. ; 3. Save settings. ; 4. Verify the setting persists.
TC-C2097,Verify permanent deletion after retention expiry,1. Create or identify a record past the approved retention period in a test environment. ; 2. Run the retention process. ; 3. Verify the record is permanently deleted.
TC-C2098,Verify retention action report,1. Run the retention process. ; 2. Open the retention action report as an authorized administrator. ; 3. Verify completed retention actions are listed.
TC-C2099,Verify operational metrics for volume and response time,1. Generate representative request activity. ; 2. Open operational metrics. ; 3. Verify request volume and response-time metrics are displayed.
TC-C2100,Verify administrator view of system error trends,1. Generate or use recorded representative system errors. ; 2. Sign in as an administrator. ; 3. Open error-trend reporting. ; 4. Verify error trends are displayed.
